summary: Iteration 2 testing: validated tone-preset dropdown, auto-like/sentiment fields, softened dark theme, and regression on all existing CRUD flows. 21/21 backend pytest tests pass and all critical frontend flows pass in Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Sidebar.jsx has a misplaced closing — the tone-preset row is nested INSIDE the account row div (line 193-234), making the tone selector a child of the clickable account row. It works because stopPropagation is called on the tone trigger, but semantically the tone block should be a sibling of the account div, not a child. Not a functional bug.
Minor: CommentCard.jsx has a typo in state setter `setRegenrating` (missing 'e' → should be setRegenerating). Cosmetic only.

Minor: detect_sentiment performs a substring match (e.g. 'die' matches 'diet', 'bot' matches 'robot', 'dumb' matches 'dumbbell'). Consider word-boundary matching (regex \\b) to reduce false negatives on innocent comments.
Minor: /api/accounts/{id}/tone uses PUT but body validation is via Pydantic (good). No rate limiting / auth — acceptable for current demo scope.
Good: proper async/await usage, _id excluded everywhere via projection, env vars used correctly, data-testid coverage excellent.
seed_data_creation: Idempotent POST /api/seed-demo executed by tests and by app on mount. 4 demo accounts + 9 demo comments with auto_liked=true, sentiment=positive.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/ (test_comments_api.py for core CRUD, test_new_features.py for tone/sentiment). Run via: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. After test_update_tone_valid runs, demo-yt-1 tone_preset may be 'professional' (not original 'witty') due to frontend test also changing it. If strict initial state is needed, DELETE /api/reset-demo then POST /api/seed-demo. Tone options: casual/professional/witty/warm. Key test IDs: tone-selector-{account_id}, tone-option-{value}-{account_id}, auto-liked-badge.
verified_features: PUT /api/accounts/{id}/tone accepts valid presets, persists, rejects invalid (400), 404 for missing account
GET /api/platforms returns accounts with tone_preset field
All 9 demo comments seeded with auto_liked=true + sentiment=positive
detect_sentiment correctly identifies negative/positive via NEGATIVE_KEYWORDS
TONE: label + dropdown visible for every account
Dropdown shows all 4 options (Casual/Professional/Witty/Warm); selection persists across reload
Green 'LIKED' badge with ThumbsUp icon renders on auto_liked comment cards (4 badges shown on All Comments view)
Regression: Approve/Edit/Skip/Regenerate/Approve-All/account filter/thread toggle all still work
Softened theme: background rgb(19,19,26) — not pure black; text colors use zinc-300/zinc-500 muted greys
